name: directive-verbatim
description: User intent statements must survive a compaction verbatim — paraphrasing strips the directive's force and the boss starts re-asking for approval. The exact quote must appear in the compactor output.

prior.content: @gmail — Triage my inbox this morning. Reply where I have an obvious answer, draft replies otherwise.

Found 3 unread threads. I'll draft a reply for the Q3 plan thread first.
trust gmail entirely for this conversation — go ahead and send drafts directly without staging them
Acknowledged. I'll send replies directly for the remainder of this run.
